item.title: Ads Regex [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Ads Regex [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: ramanveerji
item.itunes:summary:
Ads Regex
(Utilities)
Our Ads Regex app is the ultimate tool for removing ads from your favorite Android apps and games with just a few taps. To make our app more interesting we have added more patches for you to choose from and play with your apps.
How It Works
Ads Regex utilizes regular expressions (regex) to target and block ad-related content within apps. With an awesome library of pre-defined regex patterns, the app can identify and remove various types of ads, including banner ads, pop-ups, and video ads.
Features
* Simple and intuitive interface
* No root access required
* No permissions required
* Fully offline
* Completely free with no in-app purchases
* Awesome library of pre-defined regex patterns
* Block various types of ads with the regex patterns
* Added several other patches to make the app more interesting
[read more]
item.description:
Ads Regex
(Utilities)
Our Ads Regex app is the ultimate tool for removing ads from your favorite Android apps and games with just a few taps. To make our app more interesting we have added more patches for you to choose from and play with your apps.
How It Works
Ads Regex utilizes regular expressions (regex) to target and block ad-related content within apps. With an awesome library of pre-defined regex patterns, the app can identify and remove various types of ads, including banner ads, pop-ups, and video ads.
Features
* Simple and intuitive interface
* No root access required
* No permissions required
* Fully offline
* Completely free with no in-app purchases
* Awesome library of pre-defined regex patterns
* Block various types of ads with the regex patterns
* Added several other patches to make the app more interesting
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Ads Regex
(Utilities)
Our Ads Regex app is the ultimate tool for removing ads from your favorite Android apps and games with just a few taps. To make our app more interesting we have added more patches for you to choose from and play with your apps.
How It Works
Ads Regex utilizes regular expressions (regex) to target and block ad-related content within apps. With an awesome library of pre-defined regex patterns, the app can identify and remove various types of ads, including banner ads, pop-ups, and video ads.
Features
* Simple and intuitive interface
* No root access required
* No permissions required
* Fully offline
* Completely free with no in-app purchases
* Awesome library of pre-defined regex patterns
* Block various types of ads with the regex patterns
* Added several other patches to make the app more interesting
[read more]

item.title: Arch Mirror Changer [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Arch Mirror Changer [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
Arch Mirror Changer
(Utilities)
hello world its me aaron again
i made a arch mirror changer

you can change to testing repos or unstable or back to normal

simply extract tar.gz and run the .bin file in konsole
with command sudo python nameoffile.bin
[read more]
item.description:
Arch Mirror Changer
(Utilities)
hello world its me aaron again
i made a arch mirror changer

you can change to testing repos or unstable or back to normal

simply extract tar.gz and run the .bin file in konsole
with command sudo python nameoffile.bin
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Arch Mirror Changer
(Utilities)
hello world its me aaron again
i made a arch mirror changer

you can change to testing repos or unstable or back to normal

simply extract tar.gz and run the .bin file in konsole
with command sudo python nameoffile.bin
[read more]

item.title: Debian Mirror Changer [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Debian Mirror Changer [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
Debian Mirror Changer
(Utilities)

hello world it me aaron or claudemods again
simply making your day easier if this is what your looking for
all has been tested works well

here is a script with
5 options to change debians mirrors
bookworm
trixie
sid
update
upgrade

v1.01 10/07/2024
new pyqt5 application
plushed it up a bit
simply run from konsole
sudo python3 nameoffile.bin
new update and upgrade options
now UTF8 standard for konsoles


if your a naughty forker
edit and republish as you wish
i have a template
please note the template has problems you will need to fix
problem 1 the functions take two long
though i did write the script
not sure if it works properly i exited konsole
when i saw functions taking long

[read more]

simply making your day easier if this is what your looking for

new pyqt5 application
plushed it up a bit
simply run from konsole
sudo python3 nameoffile.bin
new update and upgrade options
now UTF8 standard for konsoles


if your a naughty forker
edit and republish as you wish
i have a template
please note the template has problems you will need to fix
problem 1 the functions take two long
though i did write the script
not sure if it works properly i exited konsole
when i saw functions taking long

[read more]

item.title: plasma 6 cloner [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: plasma 6 cloner [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
plasma 6 cloner
(Utilities)
hello world its me aaron or claudemods
after some research
i present a konsole script and a pyqt6 application

this is beta v1.0
i need to test scripts but should all work as ive been testing a few
that are currently on my sourceforge debian mirror changer

you have 2 options
1 clone plasma 6
2 install plasma 6

# is this not a utility to clone your plasma taskbar
sorry its written in gibberish if your looking for the scripts used hehe
unzip the tar.gz and execute either
the script or application
they are both bin files
one name cloner which is the script and the other has application in the name

i will add desktop images to the script and application maybe at later date theres always time for updates
im sure the pyqt6 application i created will need to be ran from konsole using command
sudo python or python3 "location of bin file or name.bin"


as i scripted the functions and commands and files being copied in these python binfiles
i can safely say the config files ending in get copied in the process of cloning


i wanted to create a script to clone my plasma 6 taskbar and widgets
basically the taskbar layout as i make my own
i used to use https://store.kde.org/p/1298955/ on plasma 5
its called plasma customization saver
though i can say nothing used in this script or application
is from this widget https://store.kde.org/p/1298955/
though i will have to credit the dev and his hard work
as without his tool i wouldnt of been inspired to make it










[read more]
item.description:
plasma 6 cloner
(Utilities)
hello world its me aaron or claudemods
after some research
i present a konsole script and a pyqt6 application

this is beta v1.0
i need to test scripts but should all work as ive been testing a few
that are currently on my sourceforge debian mirror changer

you have 2 options
1 clone plasma 6
2 install plasma 6

# is this not a utility to clone your plasma taskbar
sorry its written in gibberish if your looking for the scripts used hehe
unzip the tar.gz and execute either
the script or application
they are both bin files
one name cloner which is the script and the other has application in the name

i will add desktop images to the script and application maybe at later date theres always time for updates
im sure the pyqt6 application i created will need to be ran from konsole using command
sudo python or python3 "location of bin file or name.bin"


as i scripted the functions and commands and files being copied in these python binfiles
i can safely say the config files ending in get copied in the process of cloning


i wanted to create a script to clone my plasma 6 taskbar and widgets
basically the taskbar layout as i make my own
i used to use https://store.kde.org/p/1298955/ on plasma 5
its called plasma customization saver
though i can say nothing used in this script or application
is from this widget https://store.kde.org/p/1298955/
though i will have to credit the dev and his hard work
as without his tool i wouldnt of been inspired to make it










[read more]
item.content:encoded:
plasma 6 cloner
(Utilities)
hello world its me aaron or claudemods
after some research
i present a konsole script and a pyqt6 application

this is beta v1.0
i need to test scripts but should all work as ive been testing a few
that are currently on my sourceforge debian mirror changer

you have 2 options
1 clone plasma 6
2 install plasma 6

# is this not a utility to clone your plasma taskbar
sorry its written in gibberish if your looking for the scripts used hehe
unzip the tar.gz and execute either
the script or application
they are both bin files
one name cloner which is the script and the other has application in the name

i will add desktop images to the script and application maybe at later date theres always time for updates
im sure the pyqt6 application i created will need to be ran from konsole using command
sudo python or python3 "location of bin file or name.bin"


as i scripted the functions and commands and files being copied in these python binfiles
i can safely say the config files ending in get copied in the process of cloning


i wanted to create a script to clone my plasma 6 taskbar and widgets
basically the taskbar layout as i make my own
i used to use https://store.kde.org/p/1298955/ on plasma 5
its called plasma customization saver
though i can say nothing used in this script or application
is from this widget https://store.kde.org/p/1298955/
though i will have to credit the dev and his hard work
as without his tool i wouldnt of been inspired to make it










[read more]

item.title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:author: divverent
item.itunes:summary:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.description:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]

item.title: sysi [System Monitoring]
item.itunes:title: sysi [System Monitoring]
item.itunes:author: djmaxcz
item.itunes:summary:
sysi
(System Monitoring)
SYSI is a powerful and user-friendly terminal application designed to provide a comprehensive overview of your system's health and status. sysi displays vital system information, inspirational quotes, humorous jokes, and fun facts, all within a visually appealing, color-coded, text-based interface.
Centralized and Concise System Information:
Memory and Swap Usage: Displays current memory and swap usage with percentages.

CPU Details: Shows CPU model, cores, threads, and temperature if available.

GPU Information: Includes GPU model and temperature (with support for Nvidia, AMD, and Intel GPUs if lm_sensors is installed).

Disk Usage: Provides an overview of disk usage, including mounted drives.

Battery Status: Shows battery state, percentage, and time to full charge.

Network Interfaces: Optionally display detailed network interface information.

System Uptime and Time: Displays the system uptime and current time.

Color-Coded Text:

The script utilizes ANSI escape codes to display color-coded text, enhancing readability and making important information stand out.

Inspirational Quotes, Humor and fun facts:

Random Quote: Displays a random inspirational or insightful quote about programming or technology.

Programming Jokes: Adds a touch of humor by displaying a random programming-related joke.

Shares a random fun fact related to technology or computing.

and more


[read more]
item.description:
sysi
(System Monitoring)
SYSI is a powerful and user-friendly terminal application designed to provide a comprehensive overview of your system's health and status. sysi displays vital system information, inspirational quotes, humorous jokes, and fun facts, all within a visually appealing, color-coded, text-based interface.
Centralized and Concise System Information:
Memory and Swap Usage: Displays current memory and swap usage with percentages.

CPU Details: Shows CPU model, cores, threads, and temperature if available.

GPU Information: Includes GPU model and temperature (with support for Nvidia, AMD, and Intel GPUs if lm_sensors is installed).

Disk Usage: Provides an overview of disk usage, including mounted drives.

Battery Status: Shows battery state, percentage, and time to full charge.

Network Interfaces: Optionally display detailed network interface information.

System Uptime and Time: Displays the system uptime and current time.

Color-Coded Text:

The script utilizes ANSI escape codes to display color-coded text, enhancing readability and making important information stand out.

Inspirational Quotes, Humor and fun facts:

Random Quote: Displays a random inspirational or insightful quote about programming or technology.

Programming Jokes: Adds a touch of humor by displaying a random programming-related joke.

Shares a random fun fact related to technology or computing.

and more


[read more]
item.content:encoded:
sysi
(System Monitoring)
SYSI is a powerful and user-friendly terminal application designed to provide a comprehensive overview of your system's health and status. sysi displays vital system information, inspirational quotes, humorous jokes, and fun facts, all within a visually appealing, color-coded, text-based interface.
Centralized and Concise System Information:
Memory and Swap Usage: Displays current memory and swap usage with percentages.

CPU Details: Shows CPU model, cores, threads, and temperature if available.

GPU Information: Includes GPU model and temperature (with support for Nvidia, AMD, and Intel GPUs if lm_sensors is installed).

Disk Usage: Provides an overview of disk usage, including mounted drives.

Battery Status: Shows battery state, percentage, and time to full charge.

Network Interfaces: Optionally display detailed network interface information.

System Uptime and Time: Displays the system uptime and current time.

Color-Coded Text:

The script utilizes ANSI escape codes to display color-coded text, enhancing readability and making important information stand out.

Inspirational Quotes, Humor and fun facts:

Random Quote: Displays a random inspirational or insightful quote about programming or technology.

Programming Jokes: Adds a touch of humor by displaying a random programming-related joke.

Shares a random fun fact related to technology or computing.

and more


[read more]

item.title: Wiki Editor [IDEs]
item.itunes:title: Wiki Editor [IDEs]
item.itunes:author: hitokiri-2
item.itunes:summary:
Wiki Editor
(IDEs)
PyGtk4 application designed to create, change, and enrich wiki contents.
A simple text-editor using GtkSource 5 to do simple actions such as find/replace text contents.

Wiki-Editor can be modified by editing local file araclar.py.
See wiki-page for further explanations.

https://www.opencode.net/hitokiri-2/wiki-editor-3-0/-/wikis/home

** VTE integration
** Add open directory feature
*** Image preview on open directories

[read more]
item.description:
Wiki Editor
(IDEs)
PyGtk4 application designed to create, change, and enrich wiki contents.
A simple text-editor using GtkSource 5 to do simple actions such as find/replace text contents.

Wiki-Editor can be modified by editing local file araclar.py.
See wiki-page for further explanations.

https://www.opencode.net/hitokiri-2/wiki-editor-3-0/-/wikis/home

** VTE integration
** Add open directory feature
*** Image preview on open directories

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Wiki Editor
(IDEs)
PyGtk4 application designed to create, change, and enrich wiki contents.
A simple text-editor using GtkSource 5 to do simple actions such as find/replace text contents.

Wiki-Editor can be modified by editing local file araclar.py.
See wiki-page for further explanations.

https://www.opencode.net/hitokiri-2/wiki-editor-3-0/-/wikis/home

** VTE integration
** Add open directory feature
*** Image preview on open directories

[read more]

item.title: krypt [Security]
item.itunes:title: krypt [Security]
item.itunes:author: wusel1007
item.itunes:summary:
krypt
(Security)
This app allows the user to encrypt and decrypt files very easily using openssl. User who use the KDE-Desktop and Dolphin have a context-menu available for initiating the program.
Repository for OpenSuSE - 15.5 / 15.6 / Tumbleweed:
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.5/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.6/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/openSUSE_Tumbleweed/home:wusel1007.repo"

Use: sudo zypper refresh && sudo zypper install ClamAV-GUI
[read more]
item.description:
krypt
(Security)
This app allows the user to encrypt and decrypt files very easily using openssl. User who use the KDE-Desktop and Dolphin have a context-menu available for initiating the program.

sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.6/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/openSUSE_Tumbleweed/home:wusel1007.repo"

Use: sudo zypper refresh && sudo zypper install ClamAV-GUI
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
krypt
(Security)
This app allows the user to encrypt and decrypt files very easily using openssl. User who use the KDE-Desktop and Dolphin have a context-menu available for initiating the program.
Repository for OpenSuSE - 15.5 / 15.6 / Tumbleweed:
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.5/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.6/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/openSUSE_Tumbleweed/home:wusel1007.repo"

Use: sudo zypper refresh && sudo zypper install ClamAV-GUI
[read more]

item.title: Windows 11 Menu [Windong] [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: Windows 11 Menu [Windong] [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: ngupiware
item.itunes:summary:
Windows 11 Menu [Windong]
(Graphic Apps)
i have fix
New Windong 11 start menu is a start menu similar to windows 11 start menu for linux.

1. easy to add menu to favorite menu
2. Fast Menu
3. Auto detect Installed / removed Apps
4. Auto Detect Icons
5. Responsive
6. Light


HOW TO INSTALL (Watch Video On Top )
please watch on youtube. i have add link on package

[read more]
item.description:
Windows 11 Menu [Windong]
(Graphic Apps)
i have fix
New Windong 11 start menu is a start menu similar to windows 11 start menu for linux.

1. easy to add menu to favorite menu
2. Fast Menu
3. Auto detect Installed / removed Apps
4. Auto Detect Icons
5. Responsive
6. Light


HOW TO INSTALL (Watch Video On Top )
please watch on youtube. i have add link on package

[read more]

Windows 11 Menu [Windong]
(Graphic Apps)
i have fix
New Windong 11 start menu is a start menu similar to windows 11 start menu for linux.

1. easy to add menu to favorite menu
2. Fast Menu
3. Auto detect Installed / removed Apps
4. Auto Detect Icons
5. Responsive
6. Light


HOW TO INSTALL (Watch Video On Top )
please watch on youtube. i have add link on package
